{{Infobox construct
| name = Red Divine Titan
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Red Divine Titan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Red]] [[Divine Titan]], also known as [[Raion]]'s [[Titan]] or the [[Red]] [[Titan]], is a massive [[Aethertech]] machine piloted by [[Raion Raithe]] of the [[Titan Force]]. As a [[Divine Titan]], it possesses a level of consciousness and personality, though its power is so immense that pilots often struggle to maintain control. Historically, the machine was a pure scarlet color with broad chest armor, but it has since been transformed by solar dragon blood. This corruption manifests as glowing orange-gold or bright red veins of liquid sunlight that pulse through its metal plates, radiating intense heat and light from its visor and chest. In combat, the [[Red]] [[Divine Titan]] displays capabilities that exceed standard expectations for a single unit, sometimes outperforming multiple [[Titans]] working in unison. Its arsenal includes energy wings that provide propulsion, a transforming arm that functions as a cannon, and a sunlight-colored [[sword]]. It can also deploy shield projectors and unleash devastating orange energy blasts. Despite its immense strength, the [[Titan]] is prone to instability; it has experienced mental corruption that affected [[Raion]]'s mind, physical breakdowns where it appeared to be screaming in distress, and structural failures due to being heavily patched with mismatched gray metal plates and replacement parts. At various points, the machine has required extensive repairs to remain functional after intense battles.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Red Divine Titan]] is a one-hundred-fifty-foot humanoid armor with silver and red plates.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c32">''The Captain'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red]] [[Divine Titan]] is a pilotable scarlet mech used by [[Raion]] that typically remains within [[Subspace]]. While it was once pure scarlet without orange veins, the vessel now features liquid sunlight running through its veins and possesses the ability to burn brightly. During combat, the machine utilizes a sunlight-colored [[sword]] to slice through the D�iss army. This power is further enhanced by the blood of the solar dragon.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] is a scarlet mech that radiates light through sunlight veins and normally stays in [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] is a [[Divine Titan]] used by [[Raion]] that was pure scarlet and lacked orange veins in the past.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] is a [[Divine Titan]] used by [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red Divine Titan]] is a pilotable vessel.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] is slicing through the D�Niss army.}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] is enhanced by the blood of the solar dragon.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] uses a sunlight-colored [[sword]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red Divine Titan]] has veins of liquid sunlight running through it.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Red Divine Titan]] can burn brightly.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|As one of the two [[Divine Titans]] fighting on the narrator's side, the [[Red]] [[Divine Titan]] underwent repairs conducted by [[Doctor Cryce]]. During combat, the mech engaged in an aerial clash against [[Aila]]. To ensure its safety, the unit is equipped with an emergency recall function that allows it to return to the [[Shadow Ark]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] is one of two [[Divine Titans]] on the narrator's side.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Red]] [[Titan]] is being repaired.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Red Divine Titan]] is clashing against [[Aila]] in the air.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Red Divine Titan]] is a mech that was repaired by [[Doctor Cryce]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Red Divine Titan]] has an emergency recall function to return it to [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
